overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves from a bright open plaza with towering neon-lit skyscrapers into a covered pedestrian walkway, past parked futuristic vehicles and outdoor seating areas with graffiti, finally approaching a large blue staircase structure. The scene features high-quality ray-traced lighting and detailed cyberpunk architecture with vibrant neon signage.

events.description: moving from bright sunlight into the shadow of the building overpass ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza and turning left toward the covered walkway entrance

entered.detail: tall red and white tower with neon accents dominating the skyline

tall buildings with glass facades and glowing neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright, open cyberpunk plaza with towering neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the distance. The player walks forward while turning left, approaching a covered walkway entrance. The lighting shifts from bright natural sunlight to shadow as the player nears the building overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with parked futuristic vehicles

events.description: passing fully under the building overpass, sky becomes completely blocked from view
slowing slightly while navigating between parked cars and standing NPCs

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit covered walkway passing futuristic parked cars and NPCs

walking away from camera further down the covered walkway

futuristic green and black sports car parked at the curb

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a dimly lit covered walkway beneath a massive building structure. The area features parked futuristic vehicles including a distinctive green sports car and a silver sedan. NPCs stand near the vehicles, and the sky is mostly blocked by the overpass above. Large digital billboards continue to illuminate the space with artificial light.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining area under overpass with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: transitioning from vehicle parking area to pedestrian seating area with tables and chairs
approaching the prominent graffiti wall with large painted text

agents.ego_description: walking past plastic outdoor furniture and examining the graffiti art on the walls

notable_agents.action: sitting at a plastic table with back to camera, wearing white jacket

entered.detail: wall covered in colorful graffiti including large text 'EAT THE RICH' in white and pink letters
white and red plastic outdoor furniture arranged against the graffiti wall
large blue and red staircase and escalator structure leading to upper building levels

segments.scene_description: The player moves through an outdoor seating area featuring plastic tables and chairs arranged against a wall covered in vibrant graffiti. The prominent 'EAT THE RICH' graffiti becomes visible as the player approaches. In the distance, a large blue staircase structure leading to upper levels comes into view, marking the transition to a multi-level plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level urban plaza with prominent blue staircase and escalator

events.description: beginning to ascend the wide blue staircase toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: walking toward and climbing the wide blue staircase while other pedestrians move through the plaza

notable_agents.action: descending the blue stairs toward the camera
walking across the plaza carrying items

entered.detail: construction or safety barriers with red and white stripes near the stairs
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting to the building upper floors
illuminated establishment sign with palm tree decoration

segments.scene_description: The player approaches and begins ascending a large blue staircase structure in a multi-level plaza. The area features more pedestrian activity with NPCs descending the stairs and walking through the plaza. Red and white barriers line the walkway, and an upper level pedestrian bridge is visible ahead. The environment transitions from the covered walkway to a more open multi-level urban space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bright, open cyberpunk plaza into a shadowed urban underpass that eventually opens up into a multi-level pedestrian hub. It begins in the glare of natural sunlight beneath towering neon skyscrapers, moving forward and turning left as the light shifts into deep shadow upon entering a covered walkway. As the camera glides beneath the massive building overpass, the environment becomes dimly lit by digital billboards and populated by parked futuristic vehicles, including a green sports car and a silver sedan. The scene then shifts through an outdoor seating area marked by plastic furniture and vibrant graffiti, specifically the phrase "EAT THE RICH," before the view opens toward a large blue staircase. Finally, the camera ascends these stairs, transitioning from the enclosed walkway into an open multi-level plaza filled with pedestrians and red and white barriers.
